message:
Command `echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Fri May 29 10:44:04 +04 2026
278672 /bin/bash -l -c cd '/workspace' >/dev/null 2>&1 && set -a; [ -f /etc/environment ] && . /etc/environment >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; set +a; export PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT:-/nc/apps/pdk}; export NC_LIB_ROOT=${NC_LIB_ROOT:-/nc/apps}; export NC_SOCGEN_ROOT=${NC_SOCGEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/nc_socgen}; export PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT=${PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/padframe-gen}; export NC_RV32_ROOT=${NC_RV32_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_rv32/v1.1.0}; export NC_AMBA_ROOT=${NC_AMBA_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_amba/v1.1.0};  (# ABC running - monitor for its completion and subsequent steps # Poll every 15 minutes, up to 8 hours SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis" WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"  for i in $(seq 1 32); do   sleep 900   # 15 minutes      Y_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)   ABC_ALIVE=$(pgrep -c "^abc" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)   LR_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)   STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)   NL=$(ls "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)   YMEM=$(ps -p ${Y_ALIVE:-1} -o pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)   YWCHAN=$(ps -p ${Y_ALIVE:-1} -o wchan --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)   SYNTH_FILES=$(ls "$SYNTH_DIR/" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^AREA\|^COMMANDS\|^config\|^extra\|^reports\|^state\|^synthesis\|^yosys" | tr '\n' ' ')      echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} Y=${Y_ALIVE:-DONE}(${YMEM}%,${YWCHAN}) ABC=${ABC_ALIVE} | step=$STEP"   [ -n "$SYNTH_FILES" ] && echo "  new files: $SYNTH_FILES"   [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  *** NETLIST: $NL ***"   echo ""      if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then     echo "=== LibreLane DONE ==="     ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30     echo "---"     tail -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log 2>/dev/null     break   fi done)

extras.command:
echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
